question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/persistence/account.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: GetAccountId()] Can an unprivileged external user flood the Rosetta API with alias-based account lookups using random non-existent hex aliases, causing repeated `selectCurrentCryptoEntityByAlias` queries against the DB and exhausting the DB connection pool, degrading service for all other users with no economic damage?

[File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/persistence/account.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: GetAccountId()] Can an unprivileged user craft a valid-format alias (0x-prefixed hex) that maps to a deleted account, triggering `ErrAccountNotFound` repeatedly and causing the Rosetta node to log excessive error-level entries, flooding the log system and degrading observability for operators?

[File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/persistence/account.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: getCryptoEntity()] Can an unprivileged user submit concurrent requests with the same alias value to `selectCryptoEntityByAlias` UNION ALL query, causing the DB to perform repeated full scans of both `entity` and `entity_history` tables simultaneously, resulting in DB CPU exhaustion and griefing legitimate users?

[File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/persistence/account.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: getLatestBalanceSnapshot()] Can an unprivileged user supply an extremely large `consensusEnd` timestamp to `RetrieveBalanceAtBlock()`, causing `selectPreviousPartitionLowerBound` to scan all `mirror_node_time_partitions` rows with no matching partition, returning a zero `partitionLowerBound` and forcing `latestBalanceBeforeConsensus` to scan the entire `account_balance` table, causing a slow query that blocks DB resources?

[File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/persistence/account.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: RetrieveBalanceAtBlock()] Can an unprivileged user repeatedly call `RetrieveBalanceAtBlock()` with a `consensusEnd` value of 1 (minimum), causing `balanceSnapshotEndTimestamp` to underflow to 0 when an entity is deleted at timestamp 1 (via `balanceChangeEndTimestamp - 1`), triggering `ErrNodeIsStarting` and making the node appear unavailable?

[File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/persistence/account.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: getCryptoEntity()] Can an unprivileged user send requests with an alias that matches many historical entries in `entity_history`, causing the UNION ALL in `selectCryptoEntityByAlias` to return a large result set that is fully scanned and sorted by `timestamp_range desc`, consuming excessive memory and CPU on the DB server and griefing other users?
